revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Technical inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Technical language | text = jargon | title = {{delink|{{{reason|The material near this tag may be using jargon that limits the article's accessibility.}}}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:All articles that are too technical]] | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles that are too technical | cat2 = [[Category:All articles needing expert attention]] | cat-date2 = Category:Articles needing expert attention }}<!--{{Technical inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Technical inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style#Technical language | text = jargon | title = {{delink|{{{reason|The material near this tag may be using jargon that limits the article's accessibility.}}}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:All articles that are too technical]] | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles that are too technical | cat2 = [[Category:All articles needing expert attention]] | cat-date2 = Category:Articles needing expert attention }}<!--{{Technical inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
